steps.title: Find the key difference in the notes
steps.content: The notes specify that Enriquez completed a painting of Luis Jimenez in 2003 and a drawing of Rudolfo Anaya in 2016. The portraits differ fundamentally in their medium.

steps.title: Match the emphasis to the choices
steps.content: Choice C foregrounds this medium difference directly: “the 2003 portrait of Luis Jimenez is a painting, and the 2016 portrait of Rudolfo Anaya is a drawing.” The others fail to emphasize the portraits' difference—either by minimizing it (grouping them as early 2000s), ignoring it altogether (just listing both), or shifting focus from the portraits to the people depicted. That matches choice C — C is correct.
